content:
# Therm_Demagnetization

**Summary**: Removing unstable components of remanent magnetization by heating samples.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1993-kaka|Kaka, 1993]] applied therm_demagnetization to isolate the characteristic remanent magnetization (ChRM) from basaltic flows.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Thermal demagnetization behavior of more than 42 specimens were consistent with alternating-field demagnetization. ([[1993-kaka|Kaka, 1993, p. 51]])
